title: BSS Instantaneous-Mixing Spec (ICA benchmark family)

E.forward: y = A * s + n; A unknown, s components statistically independent
E.inverse: recover s and A up to permutation and scale from y alone

d_spec_notes: Distance from convolutive-BSS spec ~= 0.30 (adds reverberation dim). Distance from 393 robust PCA ~= 0.60 (Novel — different problem class).

s1_s4_justifications.S1: A in R^{MxN}, s in R^{NxT}, y in R^{MxT}. Dimensionally consistent when M>=N.
s1_s4_justifications.S2: Identifiability proven under Darmois-Skitovich (at most one Gaussian source).
s1_s4_justifications.S3: FastICA Newton iteration quadratic convergence; Infomax stochastic natural-gradient.
s1_s4_justifications.S4: epsilon_fn defined over Omega; Conv-TasNet fails on non-audio mixtures (hardness across solution families holds).
